title: RAIA Property Card
description: Public-facing property listing card for the RAIA Protocol marketplace. Address is always masked to district level. Served from snapshot_listing in tbl_asset_snapshots.

raia_id.description: External stable property identifier. Format: prop-{jurisdiction}-{org-slug}-{sequence}. Example: prop-gb-rlf-000031.

raia_version.description: RAIA Protocol version that generated this card.

rebuilt_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this card was last rebuilt.

agent_card_url.description: URL of the listing agent's RAIA agent card (/.well-known/raia-agent.json).

transaction_type.description: Whether this property is available to let or for sale. Drives which price field applies and which compliance signals are relevant.

status.description: Current marketing lifecycle status. SOLD_STC = sold subject to contract. SOLD_STCM = sold subject to contract and mortgage. LET_AGREED = letting agreed subject to referencing.

location.description: Masked location. Full address is never included in this schema.

postcode_district.description: Postcode district prefix only — never the full postcode. e.g. 'SW1', 'W6', 'BN3'. Full postcode is released after COMMITTED state.

lat.description: Approximate latitude — district centroid, never plot-level.

lng.description: Approximate longitude — district centroid, never plot-level.

headline.description: Short human-readable label. e.g. '1-bed flat, Hammersmith W6'.

description.description: Full property description. Plain text only — HTML must be stripped before populating this field.

reception_rooms.description: Number of reception rooms (living rooms, dining rooms, studies). Maps to living_rooms in Zoopla feed and reception_rooms in Rightmove feed.

floor_area_sqm.description: Total floor area in square metres.

available_from.description: ISO 8601 date when the property becomes available. Null if occupied with no confirmed vacancy date.

asking_rent_pcm.description: Asking rent per calendar month in the jurisdiction's default currency. Applies when transaction_type is LETTINGS. Null if price on application.

rent_frequency.description: Frequency of rent payments. Applies when transaction_type is LETTINGS. Defaults to MONTHLY if null.

asking_price.description: Asking price. Applies when transaction_type is SALES. Null if price on application.

price_qualifier.description: Price display qualifier. Null means the stated price is the exact asking figure.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code. e.g. 'GBP', 'THB'. Null defaults to jurisdiction default.

deposit.description: Tenancy deposit amount in the property's currency. Applies when transaction_type is LETTINGS.

tenure.description: Tenure type. Applies when transaction_type is SALES. Null for lettings.

furnishing.description: Furnishing state. Primarily applies when transaction_type is LETTINGS.

parking.description: Parking options available with the property. Empty array means not specified.

outside_space.description: Outdoor space types available with the property. Empty array means not specified.

epc_rating.description: EPC (Energy Performance Certificate) letter rating. Mandatory for marketing in GB. Null if not yet assessed or exempt.

features.description: Up to 10 notable features. e.g. ['Balcony', 'Porter', 'Permit parking']. Maps to feature_list in Zoopla feed and details.features in Rightmove feed.

media.description: Media assets for this property listing.

photos.description: Property photos ordered by sort_order ascending. First item is the primary/hero image.

epc_documents.description: EPC certificate documents or graphs. URL should indicate whether asset is a graph image or full PDF report.

brochures.description: Property brochure PDFs. URLs must end in .pdf.

listing_agent.description: The estate agency listing this property (lettings or sales).

verified.description: True if the agent is verified in the estateaigents.org registry.

enquiry_endpoint.description: URL to POST an enquiry to. Initiates the RAIA Protocol session state machine.

session_ttl_hours.description: Session TTL in hours from enquiry creation. 24 for lettings, 720 for sales.

url.description: Publicly accessible URL to the media asset. ETag support recommended to avoid unnecessary re-downloads.

order.description: Display sort order. Lower values appear first. If provided, must be unique within its media type array.

version_changes_0_2_0: Added status enum (AVAILABLE, UNDER_OFFER, SOLD_STC, SOLD_STCM, RESERVED, LET_AGREED, OFF_MARKET, WITHDRAWN)
Added asking_price for sales listings (alongside existing asking_rent_pcm for lettings)
Added media object (photos, floorplans, epc_documents, virtual_tours, brochures)
Added postcode_district to location (prefix only — never full postcode)
Renamed letting_agent to listing_agent (covers both lettings and sales)
x-raia-notes.address_masking: Full address is NEVER included in this schema. District + postcode prefix only. Full address is transmitted once per enquiry session when session state reaches COMMITTED (human-approved viewing).
x-raia-notes.price_fields: Use asking_rent_pcm for LETTINGS. Use asking_price for SALES. Both may be null when price_qualifier is PRICE_ON_APPLICATION.
x-raia-notes.authentication: Anonymous requests return this public card. Bearer delegation tokens (scope: snapshot:tenant or snapshot:landlord) served via /api/raia/property/{raia_id} return role-gated narrative tiers. See ADR-211.
x-raia-notes.source_of_truth: snapshot_listing column in tbl_asset_snapshots. Rebuilt on asset/amenity/listing change. Zero LLM cost — template fill only.
x-raia-notes.reference_implementation: RentLondonFlat on estateaigents.com — agent card at https://app.estateaigents.com/.well-known/raia-agent.json

rightmove.new_home: — not mapped in RAIA v0.2, use features array
